purpose: Single shared, versioned query -> expected-component(s) set used by Solution B (ranked-search target), Solution C (deterministic recall@k go/no-go) and Solution E (version-unknown communication case). Authored in-repo so the three tasks share one labelled set with no per-task duplication or drift. The 'components' array is a self-contained mini-catalog with populated selection metadata so the deterministic ranker can be measured BEFORE the producer backfills the live CDN payload (Solution A2) — i.e. it benchmarks the ranking algorithm, not the production data.

components.description: Image/card gallery that displays a collection of records as visual preview cards, optionally with bulk actions.
useCases: Display a collection of images as browsable preview cards
Show product photos as a card gallery
Property listing photo cards
components.whenToUse: Use to display a collection of images or visual cards, for example product photos or property cards.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for a single image — use crt.ImageInput.

components.description: Editable tabular grid that shows records in rows and sortable columns.
useCases: Show records in an editable table with columns
Tabular grid of records with sortable columns
components.whenToUse: Use for a table or grid of records with columns.

components.description: Vertical list of records without table columns.
useCases: Show records as a simple vertical list
List items without table columns
components.whenToUse: Use for a simple vertical list of records.

components.description: List of files attached to a record.
useCases: List files attached to a record
Show uploaded documents
components.whenToUse: Use to show files or attachments on a record.

components.description: Multi-column list that groups records into several parallel columns.
useCases: Show records grouped into multiple parallel columns
Kanban-style board of records
components.whenToUse: Use to group records into several parallel columns, for example a kanban board.

components.description: Single image field for uploading or displaying one image such as an avatar or logo.
useCases: Upload or display a single image such as an avatar or logo
components.whenToUse: Use for a single image such as an avatar or logo.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for a collection of images — use crt.Gallery.

components.description: Chronological feed of activities or events on a record.
useCases: Show a chronological history of activities or events
components.whenToUse: Use for a time-ordered activity or history feed.

useCases: Pick a date and time value
components.whenToUse: Use to select a date and/or time.

components.description: Dropdown that selects a lookup or option value.
useCases: Select a value from a lookup or list of options
components.whenToUse: Use to select a single value from a lookup or option set.

components.description: Phone and email communication options for a Contact or Account.
useCases: Show and edit a contact's phone numbers and email addresses
components.whenToUse: Use on Contact or Account to show phones and emails.
components.whenNotToUse: Not available on custom entities — it is bound to the built-in Contact/Account communication model.
components.entityCouplingNote: Bound to the built-in Contact/Account communication model; not available on custom entities.

useCases: Trigger an action when clicked
Enter a single line of text

components.description: Numeric input field for integer or decimal values.
useCases: Enter a numeric amount or quantity
components.whenToUse: Use for numeric entry such as an amount or quantity.

components.description: Static read-only caption or text label.
useCases: Show a static caption or heading
components.whenToUse: Use for a static caption or heading.

queries.note: ENG-91134 motivating case — a natural-language need for a card gallery must surface crt.Gallery, not a grid/file-list.

queries.query: dropdown to select a lookup value
phone numbers and emails for a contact
queries.note: Applicability case — the right component when the target entity supports it; crt.CommunicationOptions.appliesToCustomEntities is false (consumed by Solution D fail-fast / Solution E).

queries.query: what platform version is this environment running
queries.note: Version-unknown communication case for Solution E (ENG-91583). Not a component-ranking query — Solution B's recall metric ignores rows whose kind is not 'ranking'.
